subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dear to 'Abdu'l-Baha!  Thy letter was received, and the report of Count Tolstoy was also perused
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید و تقریر غراف تولستوی نیز قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
